title: Build TrampoMZ - Mozambican Service Provider PWA

requirements.text: Implement a Splash Screen that displays the TrampoMZ logo and app name centered on screen, shown briefly on first load before redirecting to the login screen.

quotes: Tela de Splash: Logo do app, Nome TrampoMZ

acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen displays TrampoMZ logo and name
Splash screen is shown for a brief duration (e.g., 2 seconds) on app load
User is redirected to the login screen after the splash

requirements.text: Implement authentication using Internet Identity (Google login). After login, prompt new users to complete their profile with: full name, phone number, location (city/neighborhood), and profession (or mark as 'client' if not a service provider).

quotes: Login com Google via Internet Identity

acceptanceCriteria: User can log in via Internet Identity (Google)
New users are prompted to fill in name, phone, location, and profession
Profile data is persisted in the backend
Authenticated users are redirected to the Home screen

requirements.text: Build a Home screen featuring: a search bar to find providers by name or profession, a horizontal scrollable row of category icons (e.g., Electrician, Plumber, Carpenter, Cleaner, Driver, Mason, IT, Other), and a vertical list of recommended service providers showing their photo, name, profession, location, star rating, and price.
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar filters providers by name or profession
Category icons are displayed in a horizontal scrollable row
Tapping a category filters the provider list
Recommended providers list shows photo, name, profession, location, average star rating, and price
Home screen is responsive and lightweight

requirements.text: Build a Provider Profile screen displaying: profile photo, full name, profession, location, hourly/service price, average star rating with total review count, a list of written reviews, a 'Contratar' (Hire) button that initiates a message, and a premium badge if the provider has a premium plan.

quotes: Foto, Nome, Profissão, Localização, Preço, Avaliações (1 a 5 estrelas), Botão 'Contratar'

acceptanceCriteria: Provider profile displays all listed fields
Star rating is shown as an average with review count
Reviews list shows reviewer name, star rating, and comment
'Contratar' button opens a new message thread with the provider
Premium badge is visible on premium provider profiles

requirements.text: Implement a backend data model and storage for: users (id, name, phone, location, profession, isPremium, avatarUrl), services/providers (linked to user), reviews (reviewer, provider, stars, comment, timestamp), and messages (senderId, receiverId, content, timestamp, threadId).

quotes: Banco de Dados: Usuários, Serviços, Avaliações, Mensagens

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores and retrieves user profiles
Backend stores and retrieves reviews per provider
Backend stores and retrieves messages grouped by thread
All CRUD operations are exposed via query/update calls

requirements.text: Build an asynchronous messaging inbox. Users can view all their message threads (showing the other party's name, last message preview, and timestamp). Clicking a thread opens the conversation. New messages are sent via an input field. The inbox refreshes via polling (no WebSockets).

quotes: Sistema de mensagens assíncrono (inbox com polling, sem chat em tempo real)

acceptanceCriteria: Inbox lists all message threads for the logged-in user
Each thread shows the other party's name, last message preview, and timestamp
Opening a thread shows full message history
User can send a new message via an input field
Inbox polls for new messages at a regular interval

requirements.text: Build a Review/Evaluation screen where a client can submit a star rating (1–5) and a written comment for a provider after hiring them. Submitted reviews must be stored in the backend and reflected in the provider's profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Review form shows a 1–5 star selector and a text comment field
Submitted reviews are saved to the backend
Provider's average rating updates after a new review is submitted
Reviews appear in the provider's profile

requirements.text: Implement premium plan and commission indicators. Provider profiles must display a 'Premium' badge if they have a premium subscription. A visible note must indicate that TrampoMZ charges a 5% commission per completed service. These are display-only indicators (no payment gateway integration).
acceptanceCriteria: Premium providers have a visible badge on their profile and in the provider list
A 5% commission notice is displayed on relevant screens (e.g., provider profile or hire confirmation)
No real payment processing is implemented

requirements.text: Apply a consistent visual theme across the entire app: warm African-inspired color palette (e.g., earthy reds, greens, and gold tones), bold readable typography, card-based layout for provider listings, and mobile-first responsive design optimized for lightweight performance on slow connections.

quotes: Interface simples, leve e adaptada para usuários com internet lenta

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette is consistent throughout all screens
Typography is legible on small mobile screens
Layouts are card-based and mobile-first
App loads quickly with minimal assets and no heavy animations

constraints: No native Android build — the app must run as a PWA in the browser
No WebSockets or real-time chat — messaging must use polling
Authentication only via Internet Identity (Google); no SMS/OTP
No external payment gateway — commission and premium are display-only
No Firebase or external database — all data stored in Motoko backend
nonGoals: Native Android or iOS app compilation
Firebase or any external database integration

required: TrampoMZ app logo — bold circular emblem with a handshake or wrench icon on a warm red-orange background, app name 'TrampoMZ' below in white sans-serif (trampo-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Splash screen background — abstract warm gradient with subtle African geometric pattern in earthy red, gold, and green tones (splash-bg.dim_1080x1920.png)
Default provider avatar placeholder — neutral silhouette icon on a light warm grey background (avatar-placeholder.dim_256x256.png)
